query: SHOW COLUMNS FROM orders WHERE Field IN ('status', 'paymentMethod', 'shippingMethod', 'customerNotes', 'deliveryRequestedWeek', 'deliveryStreet', 'deliveryCity', 'deliveryPostalCode', 'deliveryCountry', 'deliveryContactName', 'deliveryContactPhone', 'deliveryInstructions', 'deliveryStreet2', 'createdAt');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SHOW COLUMNS FROM orders WHERE Field IN ('status', 'paymentMethod', 'shippingMethod', 'customerNotes', 'deliveryRequestedWeek', 'deliveryStreet', 'deliveryCity', 'deliveryPostalCode', 'deliveryCountry', 'deliveryContactName', 'deliveryContactPhone', 'deliveryInstructions', 'deliveryStreet2', 'createdAt');
